name: Abhishek Dash
title: Senior Developer
bio: A creative enthusiast working as a MERN Developer with expertise in React.js, Vue 3, and GraphQL (Apollo Client), along with TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Strong experience with Pinia, performance optimization, coding standards, and scalable architectures. Proficient in Node.js, MongoDB, Next.js, Jest, and Happo for full-stack and testing capabilities. Additional experience with modern testing frameworks like Vitest and Testing Library. Working knowledge of Angular. Known for out-of-the-box problem-solving skills.
tagline: Out-of-the-box problem solver with strong focus on performance and scalability
